<Badge text="inngest-durable-functions" variant="note" /> <Badge text="28 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Inspect first" variant="caution" /> <Badge text="inspect-then-install" variant="default" />

> Inngest durable-workflow core subset only. Route TS serverless step workflows here; keep remaining Inngest skills global-only unless explicitly requested.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add inngest/inngest-skills --skill inngest-setup --skill inngest-durable-functions --skill inngest-events --skill inngest-steps -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/inngest-durable-functions`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from curated config (`docs/src/authoring/skills/inngest-durable-functions.mdx`) and local inventory when installed.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add inngest/inngest-skills --skill inngest-setup --skill inngest-durable-functions --skill inngest-events --skill inngest-steps -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Inspect first** (`needs-inspection`)

Curated status: `inspect-then-install`

Risk notes: Inngest durable-workflow core subset only. Route TS serverless step workflows here; keep remaining Inngest skills global-only unless explicitly requested.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Inngest durable-workflow core for defining functions with steps, retries, and event-driven durable execution in TS.

## Install Prerequisites

Install: `npx skills add inngest/inngest-skills --skill inngest-setup --skill inngest-durable-functions --skill inngest-events --skill inngest-steps -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode` status=inspect-then-install; selector=named

[inngest/inngest-skills](https://github.com/inngest/inngest-skills)
